name: Sesame Treats
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the first four ingredients together in a large bowl.
2. In a separate bowl, mix the remaining ingredients until well combined.
3. Stir the wet mixture into the dry mixture until evenly distributed.
4. Spread the batter into an oiled, square casserole dish.
5. Allow to cool completely and then freeze until firm.
6. Once firm, slice into bars and serve.
